message:
fix(rbac): scope tool RBAC checks to tools/call only and classify tools/list correctly

- Restrict RBAC readonly/writeonly tool checks to tools/call method only,
  so tools/list requests are not blocked by role-based access controls
  (tools/list should always be accessible to discover available tools)
- Refine classify_request to match tools/call and tools/list explicitly
  instead of using starts_with("tools/"), avoiding false classification
  of unknown method names that happen to start with "tools/"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
